div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Panama (Gonzalez)
div.p: Sir: There is transmitted herewith for the strictly confidential information of the Legation a copy in translation of a draft conventionNot printed. concerning radio communications, as well as a copy in translation of a draft conventionNot printed. in modification of the Treaty of November 18, 1903, between Panama and the United States, recently submitted to the Department by the Panamanian Minister in Washington in connection with the negotiations between the two Governments.
div.closer:
For the Secretary of State:
R. Walton Moore
